titleStmt.title: SII 26.436: original edition by P. R. Srinivasan
No. 436. (A.R. No. 415 of 1909.) SIDDHALIṄGAMAḌAM, TIRUKKOYILUR TALUK, SOUTH ARCOT DISTRICT.

summary.p: This inscription records a gift of 700 kuḻi of land in Kiḷiyūr in Rājarājavaḷanāḍu by the servant named Kūttan Paṉaiyaṉ alias Poṉparappiṉa Malaiyamāṉ of the same place, purchased for 1 (1/4) kaḻañju of gold from the sabhai of the same place, for two nandā lamps to be burnt in the temple of the god Tiruppulippagavar of Śiṟṟiṅgūr, a brahmadēyam, in Kuṟukkai-kūṟṟam in Malāḍu in Rājarāja-vaḷanāḍu. It is stated that the gift of lamps was made for the merit of the servant's master Rājagambhirachchēdiyarāyar who also figures in No. 435 above. The lamps were received by the Śivabrāhmaṇas of the temple who had agreed to burn them for ever.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
tribhuWritten in continuation of No. 413 above.vaṉaccakravattikaḷ śrīvirarājentracoḻadevarkku yāṇṭu 6 vatu rājarājavaḷanāṭṭu malāṭṭuk kuṟukkaikkūṟṟattu
brahmadeyañ ciṟṟiṅkūr Āḷuṭaiyār tiruppulippakavarkku Innāṭṭu kiḷiyūr malaiyamāṉkaḷ kaṉmikaḷil kūttan paṉaiyaṉāṉa poṉparappiṉa malaiyamāṉeṉ Eṅkaḷ nāyaṉār rājagyabhīrac cetiyarāyarkku naṉṟāka vaitta tirunantāviḷakku 2 Ivviraṇṭukkum Ivvūr
sabhaiyār pakkal nānkoṇṭu viṭṭaWritten one letter below the other.nilamāvatu tiruppulippakavatikkuk kiḻakkum Uppukkollaikkut teṟku mivvūr brāhmaṇa nilakkacivan tiruppulippaWritten one letter below the other.kavaṉuḷḷiṭṭār toṇṭikku meṟku paḻantevatāṉattukku vaṭakku patinaṟu cāṇ kolāl kuḻi 7 100 Ikkuḻi Eḻunūṟukku
m sabhaiyārkkoṭukkiṉa pon kaḻañcekālippoṉ kaḻañce kāluṅ kaikkoṇṭu viṟṟukkuṭutto mippaṉaiyaṉāṉa ponparappiWritten one letter below the other.ṉa malaiyamāṉukku Ivvūr mahāsabhaiyomin nilameḻunūṟuṅ kaikkoṇṭu candrādityavat tirunantā viḷakkiraṇṭu merikka kaṭa
vomāṉomikkoyiliṟ śivabrahmaṇarom Itu panmāheśvararakṣai ¬ . nda
Digital edition of SII 26.436 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
